emails.subject: RE: UW Update
emails.body: RE: UW Update There is a lot of heat building on this. Where are we now. Rick To: Buy, Rick

emails.subject: UW Update
emails.body: UW Update As of 5:00pm, we're at 75% participation and $50,500 in contributions. Per capital contribution is $601. Regards, Chip Schneider 713-853-1789 3AC 1418

emails.subject: UW Update
emails.body: UW Update We are now at 80% participation with $53,246 pledged. Great job everyone---100% is within reach! Regards, Chip Schneider 713-853-1789 3AC 1418
